plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: cc-bridge — drive Claude Code from Telegram. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: claude-slack — drive Claude Code from Slack (Socket Mode). Inbound text/files to the session pane, replies + permission buttons back; allowlist access control.

plugins.name: discord
plugins.description: claude-discord — drive Claude Code from Discord. Inbound text/files to the session pane, replies + permission buttons back; allowlist access control.
